title: EasyDoll
description: This is a player doll mod that adds a doll to the game. The doll's skin can be changed by naming it
body:
This is a player doll mod for version 1.20.1, which adds a doll to the game.
Players can change their appearance to the corresponding official skin by renaming them and then placing them.
For the decorative effect of replacing the head, this doll has the same rotating effect as the head.
At the same time, this doll can also function as a small light bulb, as it possesses ten levels of brightness
